stories.title: Kane and Bellingham put on a show in England's thr...
stories.summary: When have England been this fun at a World Cup? We react to it all: Kane, Bellingham, Tuchel. As for Croatia: Where was Modric?

stories.title: Kane leads England to statement win over Croatia
stories.summary: Harry Kane's brace helped England to a pulsating 4-2 victory against Croatia as Thomas Tuchel's side made a breathless start to their quest for World Cup glory.

stories.title: Portugal boss defends loyalty to misfiring Ronaldo...
stories.summary: Congo DR produced another stunning result at the 2026 World Cup, as the African side held one of the pre-tournament favorites, Portugal, to a 1-1 draw in Houston on Wednesday.

stories.title: Cincinnati denies claim it knew of Sorsby's bettin...
stories.summary: Cincinnati on Wednesday, responding to Brendan Sorsby's agent publicly questioning the school's handling of the quarterback's gambling in 2024, said it would never knowingly play an athlete who violated NCAA gambling rules.

stories.title: Burrow: Bengals have same vibes as LSU title team
stories.summary: Joe Burrow said the vibes on this year's Bengals' team are similar to what they were on the 2019 LSU team he led to a College Football Playoff championship.
